title: Astronomy and Space Science Review Quiz

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Comet" in Astronomy and Space Science.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An icy small body that can form a tail near the Sun
wrongAnswers: An instrument that collects and focuses electromagnetic radiation
A region where gravity prevents light from escaping
A luminous sphere of plasma powered by nuclear fusion

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Galaxy" in Astronomy and Space Science.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A huge system of stars, gas, dust, and dark matter
wrongAnswers: Studying light by separating it into wavelengths
A dense remnant of a massive star
A large body orbiting a star that clears its orbital neighborhood

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Nebula" in Astronomy and Space Science.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A cloud of gas and dust in space
wrongAnswers: Stretching of light toward longer wavelengths
A dense remnant left by a Sun-like star
A natural satellite orbiting a planet or smaller body

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Light-year" in Astronomy and Space Science.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: The distance light travels in one year
wrongAnswers: A planet orbiting a star outside the Solar System
Charged particles flowing outward from the Sun
A rocky small body orbiting the Sun

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Orbit" in Astronomy and Space Science.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: The curved path of one body around another
wrongAnswers: A powerful stellar explosion
The region where liquid water could exist on a planet's surface
An icy small body that can form a tail near the Sun
